disambiguation: This incident is not a benign autoscaler or CI burst because the high novelty score and the number of events (37) in a short time frame suggest an abnormal pattern of behavior for the principal, which is not typical for an HPA autoscaler.
key_evidence: 37 pod_create events detected in a short time frame (153 seconds)
All events attributed to the same principal: system:serviceaccount:kube-system:replicaset-controller
High novelty score of 1535 indicates unusual behavior for the principal
Events occurred during normal business hours (not off-hours)
The principal is not a novel entity, suggesting it is a legitimate service account but may be misused.
likely_intent: Malicious resource hijacking through excessive pod creation.
recommended_guardrails: Implement rate limiting on pod creation requests
Monitor and alert on unusual patterns of pod creation
Review and restrict permissions for service accounts to limit potential abuse.
